name: Burj Khalifa - The Throne of the Sky
tags: Dubai - The City That Rewrote the Rulebook
interests: dubai - the city that rewrote the rulebook
description: Stand 555 metres above the Earth on Level 148 - the world's highest public observation deck. The city below is not a view. It's a revelation. Choose Level 124/125 for the classic experience, or ascend to the SKY for Arabic sweets in the clouds with a personal ambassador.

name: Sky Views Observatory - The Glass Frontier
tags: Dubai - The City That Rewrote the Rulebook
interests: dubai - the city that rewrote the rulebook
description: 219 metres up on the Address Sky View towers - slide down a transparent glass chute on the outside of a skyscraper. Dubai's most audacious view, its most daring ride.

name: Dubai Frame - A City Captured in Gold
tags: Dubai - The City That Rewrote the Rulebook
interests: dubai - the city that rewrote the rulebook
description: The world's largest picture frame: 150 metres of gilded steel straddling Old Dubai and New. The glass sky bridge shows you both Dubais at once - the fishing village and the megacity.

name: Ain Dubai - The Colossus of Bluewaters
tags: Dubai - The City That Rewrote the Rulebook
interests: dubai - the city that rewrote the rulebook
description: The world's tallest and largest observation wheel. 250 metres above Bluewaters Island, rotating slowly through the Arabian skyline. Gondolas with a Sky Bar, a lounge, and views that don't beg - they demand.

name: IMG Worlds of Adventure - The Universe Under One Roof
tags: Dubai - The City That Rewrote the Rulebook
interests: dubai - the city that rewrote the rulebook
description: 28 million square feet of pure adrenaline: Marvel heroes, Cartoon Network villains, Haunted Hotel, and Dinosaur territory - all indoors, all day, all exhilarating.

name: Legoland Dubai - Where Bricks Build Worlds
tags: Dubai - The City That Rewrote the Rulebook
interests: dubai - the city that rewrote the rulebook
description: 40 Lego-world rides for children aged 2 - 12, including a Lego Burj Khalifa, MINILAND with global landmarks, Build-A-Boat, and the Lego Racers ride that turns engineering into play.

name: Motiongate Dubai - Hollywood Unleashed
tags: Dubai - The City That Rewrote the Rulebook
interests: dubai - the city that rewrote the rulebook
description: The Middle East's only Hollywood-branded theme park: DreamWorks, Columbia Pictures, Lionsgate, Smurfs Village. The world's fastest single-car spinning rollercoaster is here.

name: Ski Dubai - The Alpine Anomaly
tags: Dubai - The City That Rewrote the Rulebook
interests: dubai - the city that rewrote the rulebook
description: A ski slope inside a desert mall. Real snow. Real penguins. Real chairlifts. Five runs, a snow park, snowboarding, and a mountain at - 1 C when it's 45 C outside the window.

name: Aquaventure World - The Waterpark of Myths
tags: Dubai - The City That Rewrote the Rulebook
interests: dubai - the city that rewrote the rulebook
description: The world's largest waterpark at Atlantis The Palm. Plummeting tube slides, lazy rivers, private beach access, and the Lost World Aquarium - all inside one legendary Palmtop campus.

name: Global Village - 90 Nations in One Night
tags: Dubai - The City That Rewrote the Rulebook
interests: dubai - the city that rewrote the rulebook
description: The world's leading multicultural festival destination: 90 country pavilions, 3,500 live performances, carnival rides, street food from every continent, and nights that don't end quietly.

name: Museum of the Future - A Postcard from 2071
tags: Dubai - The City That Rewrote the Rulebook
interests: dubai - the city that rewrote the rulebook
description: The world's most beautiful building holds the world's most mind-expanding museum. Five floors of AI, robotics, sustainable cities, and healthcare in 2071 - interactive, immersive, and unlike anything you've ever experienced.

name: Dubai Miracle Garden - 150 Million Blooms
tags: Dubai - The City That Rewrote the Rulebook
interests: dubai - the city that rewrote the rulebook
description: 150 million flowers sculpted into castles, aeroplanes, hearts, and peacocks across 72,000 sqm of impossible colour. The world's largest natural flower garden - in the heart of the desert.

name: Dubai Aquarium & Underwater Zoo - The Shark Corridor
tags: Dubai - The City That Rewrote the Rulebook
interests: dubai - the city that rewrote the rulebook
description: 33,000 aquatic animals - including 400 sharks and rays - behind a 10-metre acrylic viewing panel. The world's largest suspended aquarium, where penguins waddle at Penguin Cove and you walk through tunnels of tiger sharks.

name: Lost World Aquarium - The Deep Reborn
tags: Dubai - The City That Rewrote the Rulebook
interests: dubai - the city that rewrote the rulebook
description: Atlantis reimagined: 430 new marine animals across 19 habitats, live mermaids, the Interactive Trident, and projection-mapped oceanic storytelling. Brighter, bolder, and more breathtaking than before.

name: The Green Planet - A Rainforest Rises in Dubai
tags: Dubai - The City That Rewrote the Rulebook
interests: dubai - the city that rewrote the rulebook
description: A four-storey bio-dome in City Walk housing 3,000 tropical plants and 500 animals - sloths, toucans, piranhas, and tree frogs - in a self-sustaining ecosystem. Dubai's most surprising secret.

name: Dubai Desert Safari - The Sands After Sundown
tags: Dubai - The City That Rewrote the Rulebook
interests: dubai - the city that rewrote the rulebook
description: 4 4 dune bashing across red sand seas at spine-tingling angles, camel rides, traditional Arabic camp, BBQ spread, belly dance, tanoura whirl, and stargazing. The quintessential Dubai evening - all in one unforgettable package.

name: AYA Universe - Where Art Becomes Gravity
tags: Dubai - The City That Rewrote the Rulebook
interests: dubai - the city that rewrote the rulebook
description: An immersive world of 13 interconnected realms: light tunnels, infinity mirrors, floating jellyfish, digital waterfalls, and glitch forests. Not a gallery. A dimension shift inside a mall on Al Quoz.

name: Ferrari World Abu Dhabi - The Temple of Speed
tags: Abu Dhabi - The Capital of Controlled Magnificence
interests: abu dhabi - the capital of controlled magnificence
description: The world's largest Ferrari-branded theme park under the world's largest space frame roof. Formula Rossa hits 240 km/h - making it the world's fastest rollercoaster. 40+ heart-stopping attractions pay tribute to the most iconic car brand on earth. One day is not enough.

name: Warner Bros. World - Gotham Meets Bedrock
tags: Abu Dhabi - The Capital of Controlled Magnificence
interests: abu dhabi - the capital of controlled magnificence
description: The world's first Warner Bros. indoor theme park: 29 rides across Gotham City, Metropolis, Cartoon Junction, Bedrock, and Dynamite Gulch. Batman, Superman, Bugs Bunny, and the Flintstones - all in a day.

name: Yas Waterworld - A Thousand Splashes
tags: Abu Dhabi - The Capital of Controlled Magnificence
interests: abu dhabi - the capital of controlled magnificence
description: 43 rides, slides, and water experiences inspired by Emirati pearl diving traditions. The Dawwama is a 238m family mega-slide. The FlowBarrel is the UAE's only surf simulator for serious wave-chasers.

name: SeaWorld Abu Dhabi - Where Ocean Meets Imagination
tags: Abu Dhabi - The Capital of Controlled Magnificence
interests: abu dhabi - the capital of controlled magnificence
description: The Middle East's first SeaWorld: no performing orca shows, pure conservation-led marine education. Six themed realms, one infinity pool overlooking Yas Bay, 68,000+ marine animals. Responsible wonder.

name: Louvre Abu Dhabi - Art Without Borders
tags: Abu Dhabi - The Capital of Controlled Magnificence
interests: abu dhabi - the capital of controlled magnificence
description: Jean Nouvel's geometric floating dome rains light on 23 interconnected galleries of 600+ objects - from ancient civilisations to contemporary masters. Where East and West share the same walls, finally.

name: Qasr Al Watan - Inside the Palace of the Nation
tags: Abu Dhabi - The Capital of Controlled Magnificence
interests: abu dhabi - the capital of controlled magnificence
description: The UAE's Presidential Palace opened its gates to the public - a rare privilege. Explore halls of governance, rare manuscripts, the Great Hall under a soaring dome, and the Palace in Motion light show at night.

name: Sharjah Aquarium - Where the Arabian Gulf Opens Up
tags: Sharjah - The Soul of the Emirates
interests: sharjah - the soul of the emirates
description: The Gulf's most educational aquarium: 250 species of marine life, the largest shark tank in the UAE outside Dubai, interactive touch pools, and exhibits on Gulf fishing traditions and coral conservation.

name: Sharjah Desert Park - The Wilderness That Waited
tags: Sharjah - The Soul of the Emirates
interests: sharjah - the soul of the emirates
description: The finest nature reserve in the UAE: Arabian Wildlife Centre, Children's Farm, a Natural History Museum, and botanical gardens. See Arabian oryx, sand gazelles, and endemic reptiles in vast open enclosures.

name: Jais Flight - The Sky as Your Runway
tags: Ras Al Khaimah - The Wild Side of the UAE
interests: ras al khaimah - the wild side of the uae
description: The world's longest zipline. 2.83 kilometres. 1,680 metres above sea level. Speeds of up to 160 km/h. You fly tandem over the Hajar Mountains in three minutes of pure superhero-grade weightlessness. The most dramatic 180 seconds in the UAE.

name: Jais Sky Tour - The Canyon Crawler
tags: Ras Al Khaimah - The Wild Side of the UAE
interests: ras al khaimah - the wild side of the uae
description: Six ziplines. Five kilometres of mountain terrain. A self-guided aerial circuit at 60 km/h, criss-crossing canyon walls and valley drops on seven consecutive platforms. For those who want the mountain, not just a moment of it.

name: Ajman Museum - The Fort That Became a Memory Palace
description: An 18th-century fortress converted into Ajman's finest museum: weapons, jewellery, archaeological artefacts, and traditional Emirati rooms recreated in painstaking detail. The quietest, richest AED 4 you'll spend in the UAE.

name: Snoopy Island - The Reef That Wears a Famous Face
tags: Fujairah - Where the Hajar Meets the Indian Ocean
interests: fujairah - where the hajar meets the indian ocean
description: A rocky outcrop shaped like Snoopy lying on his back, 100 metres off Al Aqah Beach. Beneath its surface: green turtles, blacktip reef sharks, parrotfish, moray eels, angelfish, and some of the UAE's richest living coral. Snorkel tours include equipment, kayaks, and SUP boards - all against the dramatic silhouette of the Hajar Mountains.

name: Fujairah Fort - The Watchtower That Survived Empires
tags: Fujairah - Where the Hajar Meets the Indian Ocean
interests: fujairah - where the hajar meets the indian ocean
description: Built in 1670, stormed by Wahhabists in the 1800s, shelled by the British in 1925, and still standing - Fujairah Fort is the UAE's oldest and most battle-scarred monument. Perched on a hilltop above the old town, its towers command views over mountains, date palms, and the glittering Gulf of Oman below.

name: Ain Al Madhab Hot Springs - Sulphur, Silence & the Mountains
tags: Fujairah - Where the Hajar Meets the Indian Ocean
interests: fujairah - where the hajar meets the indian ocean
description: A cluster of natural sulphur hot springs at the foot of the Hajar Mountains, long believed to have therapeutic properties. Set inside a landscaped park with pools, shaded paths, and mountain views - a completely unexpected oasis tucked at the edge of Fujairah City. Cooler, quieter, and more restorative than anything on the west coast.

name: Fujairah Museum - 4,500 Years Under One Roof
tags: Fujairah - Where the Hajar Meets the Indian Ocean
interests: fujairah - where the hajar meets the indian ocean
description: Three halls of Bronze Age artefacts, ancient weapons, traditional Emirati household objects, and an ostrich egg from the 3rd century BC. Finds from Qidfa and Bithna excavations include U-shaped tombs from 2000 BC. The emirate's entire history distilled into a small, richly stocked museum - for AED 5.

name: Dreamland Aqua Park - The Waterpark That Time Forgot (in the Best Way)
tags: Umm Al Quwain - The Gentle Giant's Secret Garden
interests: umm al quwain - the gentle giant's secret garden
description: One of the region's largest waterparks - 30+ slides, wave pools, lazy rivers, and lush landscaped gardens on the UAQ coastline - without the queues, the crowds, or the Atlantis price tag. The Twister, Black Hole, Dead Sea wave pool, and Twisting Dragons deliver genuine thrills. Overnight beach camping with cabanas and BBQ from November to April.

name: Al Sinniyah Island & UAQ Mangroves - Where Flamingos Outnumber Tourists
tags: Umm Al Quwain - The Gentle Giant's Secret Garden
interests: umm al quwain - the gentle giant's secret garden
description: A protected archipelago of mangrove-dense islands east of the UAQ mainland - home to the rare Socotra cormorant colony, flamingo flocks, seagulls, and some of the Gulf's most intact coastal ecosystems. Kayak or boat tour through the mangroves at dawn, when the water is still and the birds have the sky to themselves.

name: UAQ National Museum - The Quiet Chronicle of a Proud Emirate
tags: Umm Al Quwain - The Gentle Giant's Secret Garden
interests: umm al quwain - the gentle giant's secret garden
description: A 250-year-old fort that once sheltered the royal family of Umm Al Quwain, now a meticulously restored museum. Two round towers, a square courtyard, and rooms filled with archaeological objects, traditional tools, old photographs, and artefacts that tell the story of an emirate that has always done things quietly - and done them well.

name: Dubai Marina Dhow Dinner Cruise
tags: Dhow Cruise - Old Dubai, Carried by Water
interests: dhow cruise - old dubai, carried by water
description: A 2-hour sail through Dubai Marina's canyon of glass towers aboard a traditional wooden dhow, refurbished into a floating restaurant. International buffet dinner, live Tanoura dance, and skyline views from Ain Dubai to the Marina Yacht Club.

name: Dubai Creek Heritage Dhow Cruise
tags: Dhow Cruise - Old Dubai, Carried by Water
interests: dhow cruise - old dubai, carried by water
description: The original dhow route - sailing the historic Creek between Deira's spice souqs and Bur Dubai's wind-tower architecture. The contrast between old Arabia and the Burj Khalifa skyline, all from one wooden deck.

name: Private Dhow Charter - Family & Group Celebration
tags: Dhow Cruise - Old Dubai, Carried by Water
interests: dhow cruise - old dubai, carried by water
description: Charter the entire dhow for your group - birthdays, anniversaries, corporate gatherings. Customisable menu, decorations, and music, with the whole vessel reserved exclusively for your party along the Marina or Creek.

name: Premium Catamaran Sightseeing Cruise
tags: Premium Dubai Marina Cruise - The Skyline, Elevated
interests: premium dubai marina cruise - the skyline, elevated
description: A sleek catamaran with a sundeck and shaded lounge - gliding past Ain Dubai, Bluewaters Island, and the Marina towers. Faster and more stable than a dhow, with panoramic 360 views and onboard refreshments.

name: Marina BBQ Sunset Cruise
tags: Premium Dubai Marina Cruise - The Skyline, Elevated
interests: premium dubai marina cruise - the skyline, elevated
description: Watch the Marina towers turn gold as the sun sets, with a live BBQ grill on deck, unlimited soft drinks, and a DJ setting the mood. A more relaxed, social alternative to the formal dinner buffet cruise.

name: Private Speedboat Marina Tour
tags: Premium Dubai Marina Cruise - The Skyline, Elevated
interests: premium dubai marina cruise - the skyline, elevated
description: A 30 - 45 minute adrenaline-laced speedboat run past Burj Al Arab, Atlantis, and the Marina skyline - for those who want the views without the dinner-cruise pace. Photos and video included on most packages.

name: 42ft Yacht - Intimate Private Charter
tags: Premium Yachts - For Private Parties & Corporate Events
interests: premium yachts - for private parties & corporate events
description: The perfect entry point into Dubai yachting - a sleek 42-footer for couples, small families, or close friends. Cruise past Ain Dubai and Palm Jumeirah with your own private captain and crew.

name: 56 - 65ft Yacht - Team Offsites & Family Parties
tags: Premium Yachts - For Private Parties & Corporate Events
interests: premium yachts - for private parties & corporate events
description: Comfortably hosts 19 - 30 guests - the sweet spot for birthdays, team offsites, and family celebrations that actually feel like a party. Sun deck, lounge seating, and optional BBQ or catering add-ons.

name: 71 - 88ft Yacht - Floating Estate for Corporate Events
tags: Premium Yachts - For Private Parties & Corporate Events
interests: premium yachts - for private parties & corporate events
description: Expanded lounges, larger sun decks, and richer finishes - built to host 30 - 65 guests for serious corporate hospitality, product launches, or milestone celebrations on the water.

name: 100ft+ Superyacht - VIP & Large-Scale Events
tags: Premium Yachts - For Private Parties & Corporate Events
interests: premium yachts - for private parties & corporate events
description: Multi-deck superyachts with cinema-grade sound, VIP lounges, and full chef setups - the kind of private floating venue reserved for milestone corporate galas, weddings, or VIP entertaining at the highest level.

name: Executive Sedan Limousine
tags: Limousine Premium - Arrive Like You Mean It
interests: limousine premium - arrive like you mean it
description: A premium sedan with a professional, uniformed chauffeur - discreet, punctual, and built for business travel, hotel transfers, or simply arriving in quiet comfort. RTA-licensed and fully insured.

name: Stretch Limousine - Weddings & Celebrations
tags: Limousine Premium - Arrive Like You Mean It
interests: limousine premium - arrive like you mean it
description: The classic stretch limousine - leather salon interior, mood lighting, and a spacious cabin built for bridal parties, anniversaries, and milestone celebrations across Dubai's most photogenic backdrops.

name: Premium SUV / 8-Seater Limousine
tags: Limousine Premium - Arrive Like You Mean It
interests: limousine premium - arrive like you mean it
description: An elevated SUV-class limousine seating up to 10 - privacy partitions, premium audio, and the legroom your group actually needs. Ideal for families, small corporate groups, or VIP guest transport.

name: Buses, Cars & Vans Across the UAE
tip: From a single executive sedan to a 66-seater corporate coach — reliable, RTA-compliant ground transport connecting every emirate, every airport, every itinerary.
description: From a single executive sedan to a 66-seater corporate coach — reliable, RTA-compliant ground transport connecting every emirate, every airport, every itinerary.

name: Group Transport
tip: Book Group Transport in advance with MyGlobalTrips for current availability and inclusions.

tip: Book Corporate Groups in advance with MyGlobalTrips for current availability and inclusions.

tip: Book Large Corporate in advance with MyGlobalTrips for current availability and inclusions.

name: Mega Groups/MICE
tip: Book Mega Groups/MICE in advance with MyGlobalTrips for current availability and inclusions.
description: Book Mega Groups/MICE in advance with MyGlobalTrips for current availability and inclusions.

name: Inter-Emirate Transfer
tip: Book Inter-Emirate Transfer in advance with MyGlobalTrips for current availability and inclusions.
description: Book Inter-Emirate Transfer in advance with MyGlobalTrips for current availability and inclusions.

name: Dubai Airport Meet & Greet Transfer
tags: Premium Ground Transfers - Buses, Cars & Vans Across the UAE
interests: premium ground transfers - buses, cars & vans across the uae
description: A chauffeur with a name board waiting inside the terminal, luggage assistance, and a direct ride to your hotel in a premium sedan or SUV. The first impression of your UAE holiday, handled properly.

name: Inter-Emirate Day Tour Transfer
tags: Premium Ground Transfers - Buses, Cars & Vans Across the UAE
interests: premium ground transfers - buses, cars & vans across the uae
description: A dedicated vehicle and driver for a full day covering Dubai to Abu Dhabi, Sharjah, Fujairah, or Ras Al Khaimah and back - flexible stops, your schedule, no rushing between sights.

name: Corporate Event & MICE Transport
tags: Premium Ground Transfers - Buses, Cars & Vans Across the UAE
interests: premium ground transfers - buses, cars & vans across the uae
description: End-to-end transport coordination for conferences, incentive groups, and corporate events - multiple vehicles, synchronised pickup schedules, and a single point of contact for the entire group's movement.

name: Sunrise Desert Balloon Flight + Bedouin Breakfast
tags: Hot Air Balloon - The Desert as the Sun First Sees It
interests: hot air balloon - the desert as the sun first sees it
description: Rise 4,000 feet above the Dubai Desert Conservation Reserve as the sun clears the dunes, drifting silently for 45 - 60 minutes over camels, oryx, and gazelles. Land to a gourmet Arabian breakfast at a traditional Bedouin camp, with falconry demonstrations.

name: Premium Balloon Flight + Camel Ride
tags: Hot Air Balloon - The Desert as the Sun First Sees It
interests: hot air balloon - the desert as the sun first sees it
description: The full desert morning - a balloon flight, followed by a guided camel ride through the dunes, then breakfast beneath the open sky. A complete Arabian morning, built for first-time UAE visitors and honeymooners alike.

name: Private Balloon Charter - Proposals & Exclusive Flights
tags: Hot Air Balloon - The Desert as the Sun First Sees It
interests: hot air balloon - the desert as the sun first sees it
description: Your own dedicated balloon and pilot - no sharing the basket with strangers. The definitive setting for marriage proposals, anniversaries, or simply a flight on your own schedule with total privacy.

name: The Iconic Tour - 12 Minutes
tags: Helicopter Rides - Dubai's Skyline From a Pilot's Seat
interests: helicopter rides - dubai's skyline from a pilot's seat
description: The essential Dubai flyover: Palm Jumeirah, Atlantis The Palm, and the sail-shaped Burj Al Arab from above. The perfect introduction to aerial Dubai for first-time visitors or those on a tighter budget.

name: The Palm Tour - 17 Minutes
tags: Helicopter Rides - Dubai's Skyline From a Pilot's Seat
interests: helicopter rides - dubai's skyline from a pilot's seat
description: Extends the Iconic route to include Downtown Dubai and the Burj Khalifa - a closer, more detailed look at the city's modern skyline alongside the coastal landmarks of the first tour.

name: The Grand Tour - 30 Minutes
tags: Helicopter Rides - Dubai's Skyline From a Pilot's Seat
interests: helicopter rides - dubai's skyline from a pilot's seat
description: The complete aerial story of Dubai - World Islands, Dubai Creek, the entire coastline, and inland development. For photographers, repeat visitors, and anyone who wants the full picture, not just the highlights.

name: Private Helicopter Charter - Proposals & VIP
tags: Helicopter Rides - Dubai's Skyline From a Pilot's Seat
interests: helicopter rides - dubai's skyline from a pilot's seat
description: The entire helicopter reserved for your group only - no strangers, your own schedule, and an in-flight moment that can include a proposal, birthday celebration, or simply uninterrupted views with people you choose.

name: Jet Ski Tour - Burj Al Arab & Atlantis
tags: Water Sports - The Gulf at Full Throttle
interests: water sports - the gulf at full throttle
description: Speed across the Gulf with the Burj Al Arab and Atlantis The Palm as your backdrop. Certified guides, photo and video included on most packages, suitable for first-timers and experienced riders alike.

name: Parasailing Over JBR Beach
tags: Water Sports - The Gulf at Full Throttle
interests: water sports - the gulf at full throttle
description: Rise 250 metres above the Gulf, towed by speedboat, for panoramic views of the Palm, the Marina skyline, and JBR's beachfront from a totally different angle. Calm, scenic, and accessible to nearly everyone.

name: Flyboard Experience - Jumeirah
tags: Water Sports - The Gulf at Full Throttle
interests: water sports - the gulf at full throttle
description: Strap into a water-propelled jetpack and rocket above the surface like a superhero, fully guided by a certified instructor. The most photogenic, most talked-about water sport on this list.

name: Self-Drive BBQ Boat Day
tags: Water Sports - The Gulf at Full Throttle
interests: water sports - the gulf at full throttle
description: A self-driveable BBQ pontoon boat for small groups - grill onboard, cruise at your own pace, and anchor wherever the view looks best. No license required, just a sense of adventure.

name: Donut Ride / Banana Boat
tags: Water Sports - The Gulf at Full Throttle
interests: water sports - the gulf at full throttle
description: The classic group water sport - hold on tight as your inflatable donut or banana boat gets towed and flipped across the waves. The most laugh-out-loud activity in the whole lineup.

name: Wakeboarding - Dubai Marina
tags: Water Sports - The Gulf at Full Throttle
interests: water sports - the gulf at full throttle
description: Carve across the wake behind a speedboat on the calm waters of Dubai Marina, with instructor guidance for beginners and full freedom for experienced riders.

name: Scuba Diving & Snorkelling - Fujairah Coast
tags: Water Sports - The Gulf at Full Throttle
interests: water sports - the gulf at full throttle
description: The UAE's only east-coast diving grounds - coral reefs, reef sharks, and turtles around Snoopy Island. PADI-certified instructors for beginners through to advanced divers.

name: Kayaking - Dubai Water Canal & Mangroves
tags: Water Sports - The Gulf at Full Throttle
interests: water sports - the gulf at full throttle
description: A quieter, more reflective water experience - paddle through the Dubai Water Canal or the mangrove channels of Jubail Island at your own pace, ideal for families and nature lovers.

name: Jais Flight - World's Longest Zipline
tags: Zipline - From Mountain Peaks to City Skylines
interests: zipline - from mountain peaks to city skylines
description: The Guinness World Record holder: 2.83 kilometres of zipline at 1,680 metres above sea level, reaching speeds up to 160 km/h. Three minutes of superhero-grade flight across the Hajar Mountains - the most dramatic ride in the UAE.

name: Jais Sky Tour - 6-Line Mountain Circuit
tags: Zipline - From Mountain Peaks to City Skylines
interests: zipline - from mountain peaks to city skylines
description: A self-guided circuit of six consecutive ziplines covering 5 kilometres of canyon terrain at speeds up to 60 km/h. For those who want the full mountain experience, not just one fast flight.

name: XLine Dubai Marina - Urban Zipline
tags: Zipline - From Mountain Peaks to City Skylines
interests: zipline - from mountain peaks to city skylines
description: The world's longest urban zipline - launched from a 170-metre tower, soaring above Dubai Marina's promenade and JBR beach at speeds up to 80 km/h. Skyscraper-level adrenaline in the heart of the city.

name: Classic Evening Desert Safari with BBQ Dinner
tags: Desert Safari - The Sands After the City Sleeps
interests: desert safari - the sands after the city sleeps
description: The quintessential Dubai evening: 4 4 dune bashing across the red sands of Lahbab at golden hour, a stop atop the highest dune for sunset photos, then a traditional Bedouin camp with camel rides, henna, shisha, Tanoura and belly dance shows, and an Arabic-international BBQ buffet under the stars.

name: Premium Safari - Quad Bike & Dune Buggy Add-On
tags: Desert Safari - The Sands After the City Sleeps
interests: desert safari - the sands after the city sleeps
description: Everything in the Classic Safari, upgraded with a 30-minute quad bike ride across the dunes and the option to add a dune buggy session - for travellers who want the adrenaline to match the scenery.

name: Overnight Desert Safari - Sleep Under the Stars
tags: Desert Safari - The Sands After the City Sleeps
interests: desert safari - the sands after the city sleeps
description: An 18-hour immersion: dune bashing, camel rides, BBQ dinner and entertainment, then sleeping in a real Bedouin tent on a Nawar bed - followed by a sunrise camel trek and Arabian breakfast before your hotel drop-off.

name: Morning Desert Safari - Dunes Before the Heat
tags: Desert Safari - The Sands After the City Sleeps
interests: desert safari - the sands after the city sleeps
description: A 4-hour adventure timed for the cool morning hours: dune bashing, sandboarding, and a short camel ride, returning to your hotel before midday - ideal for travellers who want the thrill without sacrificing an entire evening.

name: Private Desert Safari - Your Own Land Cruiser & Driver
tags: Desert Safari - The Sands After the City Sleeps
interests: desert safari - the sands after the city sleeps
description: The full Classic Safari experience with no shared seating - your own 4 4, your own driver, and a separate private seating area at the Bedouin camp. The choice for families, honeymooners, and anyone who prefers privacy over the shared-vehicle crowd.

name: Sheikh Zayed Grand Mosque - The White Cathedral of Islam
description: The world's third-largest mosque: 82 domes, 1,000 columns, 24-carat gold-plated chandeliers, and the world's largest hand-knotted carpet. Free entry. Dress code required. Photographs welcome.
interests: abu dhabi - the capital of controlled magnificence
tags: Abu Dhabi - The Capital of Controlled Magnificence

name: Sharjah Heritage Area - Streets That Remember Everything
description: Restored wind towers, spice-scented souqs, the Sharjah Museum of Islamic Civilisation, and the Heart of Sharjah old city district. A living archive of pre-oil Arabia, kept intentionally unhurried.
interests: sharjah - the soul of the emirates
tags: Sharjah - The Soul of the Emirates

name: Al Jazeera Al Hamra - A Town Frozen in Time
description: A ghost town of 70+ abandoned coral-and-gypsum structures dating to the early 20th century. Mosques, mansions, a souq, and a fort left intact when the inhabitants departed in 1968. The UAE's most atmospheric secret.
interests: ras al khaimah - the wild side of the uae
tags: Ras Al Khaimah - The Wild Side of the UAE

name: Ajman Corniche & Dhow Building Yard - The Sea's Workshop
description: A 4-kilometre beachfront flanked by the last working dhow-building yard in the UAE. Watch craftsmen hand-construct ocean vessels using 500-year-old techniques, then stroll the most uncrowded coastline in the Emirates.

name: Al Bidyah Mosque - Where Islam First Took Root in the UAE
description: The oldest surviving mosque in the UAE, built in 1446 from mud brick with four unique domes and no internal columns. Surrounded by archaeological ruins and overlooking a wadi, it is the most serene and historically significant stop on the east coast. A living monument to 600 years of unbroken faith.
interests: fujairah - where the hajar meets the indian ocean
